title: CSR
description: A mod that combines multiple feature inspirations from other mods into one mod.
body:
# CSR
CSR is a mod that provides multiple features by using inspirations of other mods. 
## Keybind:
Right shift to open the gui.
## Features:
Armor HUD
Click sounds
CPS counter
Drop settings
Effect icon remover
Fps counter
Hitbox color
Hit color
Keystrokes
NameInF5
NametagPing
NickHider
NoFire
Scoreboard
Static items
Swing speed
Totem Particles
